body: DialogQCA is a desktop interface for Qualitative Comparative Analysis built on top of R and the QCA package.

It brings the main QCA workflow into a guided graphical environment, so researchers can move from data preparation to truth tables, minimization, calibration, and interpretation without leaving the application.
highlights: Connects directly to the R runtime and the QCA package.
Provides dialog-driven workflows for common comparative set-analysis tasks.
Keeps methods accessible while remaining close to the underlying analytical tools.
